blocks.text: Strade Bianche fires the starting gun on Spring Classics
🚴 Strade Bianche — Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on Tuscan gravel, 12:00
Hovland sits T9 at -4 at Bay Hill, nine off Berger's pace. A closing round charge needed to make this Signature Event count.

blocks.label: 🏆 Champions League — Tue & Wed
items: ⚽ Wed 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Manchester City

blocks.text: Wednesday is unmissable: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP in the biggest European club match ever played on Norwegian soil — while Real Madrid host City at the Bernabéu the same night.
